train.sentence: The system must validate input and encrypt the data and log the result.
The service must authenticate the user and apply rate limiting and return a token.
The system must back up the database and notify the admin.
The admin and the user must both confirm the deletion.
The frontend and the backend must validate the input.

train.span: when login fails or session expires
train.sentence: When login fails or the session expires, the user must be redirected.
If the user is unauthenticated or unauthorised, the system must return HTTP 403.
The system must encrypt all data and respond within 200ms.
The service must authenticate the user and maintain 99.9% uptime.
The API must respond within 200ms for 95% of requests under 1000 RPS.
The system must encrypt all data before writing to disk.
The service must return HTTP 400 for invalid input.
When the session expires, the user must be redirected to the login page.
The system must support downloading PDF files to disk.
The API must respond within 200ms for 95% of requests.
The system must encrypt all data before writing to disk.

train.span: The solution should provide detailed context-sensitive help material for all the possible actions and scenarios on all user interfaces in the application.
train.sentence: The solution should provide detailed context-sensitive help material for all the possible actions and scenarios on all user interfaces in the application.

train.span: The help should be accessible to the users both in the offline and online mode.
train.sentence: The help should be accessible to the users both in the offline and online mode.

val.sentence: The API must parse the request, validate the schema, and store the record.
The gateway must validate the token and log each request.
The pipeline must compress the payload and encrypt it before sending.
The admin and the operator must approve changes before deployment.
Users and administrators must have access to the audit log.

val.span: when memory high or CPU high
val.sentence: When memory usage is high or CPU usage is high, the service must scale out.

val.span: if missing or malformed or duplicate
val.sentence: If the request is missing or malformed or duplicate, the system must reject it.

val.span: validate and use no more than 256MB
val.sentence: The API must validate the token and use no more than 256MB of memory.
The service must sign the payload and complete within 100ms.
The search endpoint must return results within 500ms for 99% of requests.
The login endpoint must return HTTP 401 for invalid tokens.
When input is invalid, the system must return a 400 error.
After payment is confirmed, the order must be created within 5 seconds.
The system must encrypt all records before writing to the audit log.
The service must never crash in production.
The service must return HTTP 400 for invalid input.
The scheduler must notify the admin and update the job status.
If the token is expired or revoked, the system must reject the request.
The service must hash the password and store the digest.
The report service must generate the PDF and return it within 50ms.
The batch job must complete before the deadline each night.
The payment gateway must maintain an error rate below 0.1% of transactions.
The client and the server must both support TLS 1.3.
The system must support downloading PDF files to disk.
The compliance module must audit all access events and report weekly.
